Setting.Name: ZnunyAgentList::AllowedGroups
Setting.Description: Group names allowed to use the ZnunyAgentList GenericInterface helper operations. Agents must have at least ro permission in one configured group. The package does not create groups, users, roles, or permissions.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###User::AgentList
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only agent list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Queue::List
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only queue list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Queue::Get
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only queue get operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###CustomerUser::Search
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only customer user search operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###CustomerUser::Get
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only customer user get operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::ResolveTicketDefaults
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the ticket defaults resolver operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::StateList
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only ticket state list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::PriorityList
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only ticket priority list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::TypeList
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only ticket type list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::ServiceList
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only service list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::SLAList
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the read-only SLA list operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###Ticket::ValidateTicketCreate
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the non-mutating ticket create validation operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###ZnunyAgentList::Config
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the package capability config operation.

Setting.Name: GenericInterface::Operation::Module###ZnunyAgentList::Health
Setting.Description: GenericInterface operation module registration for the package health operation.
